  requires n >= 1

    }

  requires n >= 1
  requires |scores| >= n
  requires forall i | 0 <= i < n :: |scores[i]| >= 4

    if otherScore > myScore {
      rank := rank + 1;
    }
    i := i + 1;
  }
  assert scores[1..n] == scores[1..i];
  return;
}
